description: User-defined gear series. A series can group official sets, custom sets, and loose gear pieces.

idRules.note: Series ids must be strings, not numbers, so they never conflict with game item ids or official set ids.

emptyGearSeries.name: 装备系列名称
emptyGearSeries.note: 这里写人工判断，例如：同主题、同来源、同外观风格、同版本或同模型系列。

series.name: 世传系列
series.note: 半自动候选：根据套装名中职能词前的共同前缀归组，请人工确认。
